assessment: scorer is structurally biased toward building/domestic crises. frequency windows need signal accumulation time. sudden external shocks (carry trade, initial pandemic, first GFC tremors) are blind spots.
scorer peak consistently LAGS actual crash peak. GFC: worst crash Oct, score peak Nov. 2026: crash 3/3-4, score still rising 3/6. this is expected: score measures propagation/aftermath, not trigger.
